paper_focus.title: Effects of Nitrogen on the Microstructure and Mechanical Properties of Fe–28Mn–10Al–0.8C Low-Density Steel
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the effects of nitrogen addition on the non-metallic inclusion characteristics, microstructure evolution, and resultant mechanical properties of Fe-28Mn-10Al-0.8C low-density steel.

visual_evidence.description: Figure 1 presents schematic diagrams illustrating the standardized geometries and machining dimensions of mechanical test specimens used for evaluating Fe–28Mn–10Al–0.8C low-density steels with varying nitrogen content....
